architecture.summary: Confirmed merged count approach for totalSkills, certTier->trustTier mapping, report modal pattern, auto-refresh with relative time

ux.summary: Full-page overlay modal for reports, relative time display, circular refresh button

data.summary: Seed-only unscanned skills count as T1, Prisma certTier maps to T2/T3/T4, blocklist entries count as T0

resilience.summary: Retry button restarts full 3-attempt exponential backoff cycle
